title: Fable 5 Replacement Just Dropped: Fusion (Fable Level AI)
summary: OpenRouter introduced Fusion, a system that routes a single prompt to multiple AI models, compares their responses, identifies gaps, and synthesizes them into a stronger unified response. A budget Fusion setup achieved near-Fable 5 performance on deep research benchmarks at approximately half the cost.
writeup: The video covers Fusion, a system from OpenRouter that routes a single prompt to multiple AI models, compares their responses, identifies gaps, and synthesizes the outputs into one unified answer. The approach matters because it applies ensemble methods and smart routing rather than relying on a single model to handle every query. The key takeaway: a budget Fusion configuration reached near-Fable 5 performance on deep research benchmarks at roughly half the cost.
